name: Shrimp and Vegetable Salad with Pine Nut Dres
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook, peel, and cut shrimp into lengthwise halves.
2. Shred romaine lettuce and place it in the center of the salad platter.
3. Arrange shrimp, vegetables, and fruit alternately around the romaine in a spoke pattern.
4. Pulse pine nuts in a blender until finely ground.
5. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, soy sauce, water, sugar, and mustard. Blend well to create the dressing.
6. Serve the salad with the dressing on top. Makes 6 servings.
